panels.description: Number of tokens processed per second

targets.expr: sum by (model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_prompt_tokens_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))
sum by (model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_generation_tokens_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))

panels.title: vLLM: Token Throughput

panels.description: P50, P90, P95, P99, and Mean TPOT latency

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

(sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_time_per_output_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

panels.title: vLLM: Time Per Output Token Latency

panels.description: Percentage of used KV cache blocks by vLLM.

targets.expr: sum by (WorkerId) (ray_vllm_kv_cache_usage_perc{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""})

panels.title: vLLM: Cache Utilization

panels.description: Percentage of prefix cache hits. Higher is better for repeated prefixes.

targets.expr: max(100 * (sum by (WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_prefix_cache_hits_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])) / sum by (WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_prefix_cache_queries_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))))

min(100 * (sum by (WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_prefix_cache_hits_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])) / sum by (WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_prefix_cache_queries_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))))

100 * (sum by (WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_prefix_cache_hits_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])) / sum by (WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_prefix_cache_queries_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

panels.title: vLLM: Prefix Cache Hit Rate

panels.description: P50, P90, P95, P99, and Mean TTFT latency

targets.expr:
(sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_time_to_first_token_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_time_to_first_token_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId)(rate(ray_vllm_time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId)(rate(ray_vllm_time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId)(rate(ray_vllm_time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

panels.title: vLLM: Time To First Token Latency

panels.description: End-to-end request latency from arrival to completion.

targets.expr:
sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

panels.title: vLLM: E2E Request Latency

panels.description: Number of requests in RUNNING, WAITING, and SWAPPED state

targets.expr: ray_vllm_num_requests_running{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}
ray_vllm_num_requests_swapped{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}
ray_vllm_num_requests_waiting{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}

panels.title: vLLM: Scheduler State

panels.description: P50, P90, P95, P99, and Mean time requests spend waiting in the queue.

targets.expr:
(sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_queue_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_queue_time_seconds_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_queue_time_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.9, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_queue_time_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_queue_time_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_queue_time_seconds_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

panels.title: vLLM: Queue Time

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_prompt_tokens_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_prompt_tokens_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

(sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_prompt_tokens_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))
/
sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_prompt_tokens_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_generation_tokens_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
histogram_quantile(0.90, sum by(le, model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_generation_tokens_bucket{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

(sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_generation_tokens_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))
/
(sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_generation_tokens_count{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval])))

panels.description: Number of finished requests by their finish reason: EOS token or max length reached.

targets.expr: sum by(finished_reason, model_name, WorkerId) (increase(ray_vllm_request_success_total{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))

panels.title: vLLM: Finish Reason

panels.description: Time spent in prefill vs decode phases.

targets.expr: sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_prefill_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))
sum by(model_name, WorkerId) (rate(ray_vllm_request_decode_time_seconds_sum{model_name=~"$vllm_model_name", WorkerId=~"$workerid", ReplicaId=""}[$interval]))

panels.title: vLLM: Prefill and Decode Time

list.description: Filter queries of a specific Prometheus type.
list.name: datasource
